title: Kuo-Yuan Kao
text: Home * People * Kuo-Yuan Kao Kuo-Yuan Kao [1] Kuo-Yuan Kao , a Taiwanese mathematician, computer scientist, and professor at Information Management Department, National Penghu University of Science and Technology , Penghu . He holds a Ph.D. on combinatorial game theory in 1997 [2] from University of North Carolina at Charlotte under supervision of Ken Chen [3] . Kuo-Yuan Kao is author of the early Go program Stone , which participated at the 1st Computer Olympiad, Go , London 1989.
